accountsPromos.chequingDesc: Bona kugeza kuri $750 y'agaciro ufunguye Konti ya Sheki. Ibisabwa birakurikizwa.
accountsPromos.newcomerDesc: Bona kugeza kuri $1,790 y'agaciro ukoresheje banki nkatwe nk'umushya. Ibisabwa birakurikizwa.

cardsPromos.rewardsDesc: Kugeza kuri $1,350 y'agaciro harimo kugeza kuri manota 40,000. Ibisabwa birakurikizwa.
cardsPromos.travelTitle: PRIME TRUST First Class Travel Visa
cardsPromos.travelDesc: Bona kugeza kuri $1,300 y'agaciro hamwe na manota 146,000. Ibisabwa birakurikizwa.

mortgagesPromos.directDesc: Subiza ibibazo bike tuzaguhamura kugirango duhuze numuhanga.
mortgagesPromos.cashbackDesc: Bona kugeza kuri $5,100 cashback hamwe n'inguzanyo nshya. Ibisabwa birakurikizwa.

loansPromos.borrowingDesc: Bona inama zizagufasha gutira ubwenge no gufata ibyemezo by'ubucuruzi.
loansPromos.studentDesc: Bona inama z'abahanga kubijyanye no kubaka ingengo y'imbuga n'ibindi.

insurancePromos.claimDesc: Turi guteguriye kukuyobora buri ntambwe igihe ukeneye gutanga ikirego.

hero.title: Inguzanyo Zihuse hamwe na
hero.description: Bona kugeza kuri 50M RWF mu masaha 15 nta nguzanyo. Ibipimo byiza, uburyo bworoshye, n'ubutabazi bwiza.

loanServices.title: Serivisi Zacu z'Inguzanyo
loanServices.subtitle: Inguzanyo zikwiriye buri kibezo — kuva mu bucuruzi kugeza mu bukwe
loanServices.businessLoansDesc: Fasha ubucuruzi bwawe gukura ufite inguzanyo zikwiriye.
loanServices.emergencyLoansDesc: Bona amafaranga vuba iyo ubikeneye cyane. Kwemeza byihuse.
loanServices.salaryLoansDesc: Inguzanyo zihendutse ku bahanga bafite imishahara n'uburyo bwo kwishyura bworoshye.
loanServices.educationLoansDesc: Shora imari mu kazoza kawe ukoresheje inguzanyo zagenewe amashuri.
loanServices.investmentLoansDesc: Kura ubukungu bwawe ukoresheje inguzanyo z'ishoramari.
loanServices.capitalLoansDesc: Bona umutungo ukeneye gutangira cyangwa gukura ubucuruzi.

digitalBanking.internetDesc: Gucunga konti zawe kuri interineti uva aho uri
digitalBanking.mobileAppDesc: Kora banki ingirakamaro ukoresheje porogaramu yacu
digitalBanking.ussdDesc: Bona serivisi za banki nta interineti
digitalBanking.agencyDesc: Sura abakozi bacu b'ibizewe hafi yawe

testimonials.title: Iby'Abakiliya Bacu Bavuga
testimonials.subtitle: Twizewe n'ibihumbi by'abakiliya mu Rwanda hose

1.name: Marie Claire
1.quote: Prime Trust Finance yamfashije gukura ubucuruzi bwanjye binyuze mu nguzanyo zihendutse. Inzira yihuse kandi irangwa n'umusemburo.

2.name: Patrick N.
2.quote: Porogaramu ya mobile ituma banki yoroha cyane. Nshobora kohereza amafaranga, kwishyura amafaranga, no gucunga konti zanjye igihe icyo aricyo cyose.

3.name: Aline M.
3.quote: Kohereza amafaranga mu rugo ntibyigeze biroroha. Prime Trust isobanukirwa n'ibyo Abanyarwanda bo mu mahanga bakeneye.

quickPlus.title: Prime Trust Quick+
quickPlus.description: Bona kugeza kuri 50M RWF mu masaha 15 nta nguzanyo. Vuba, yoroshye, kandi bihendutse.

mobileApp.title: Kura Porogaramu ya Mobile
mobileApp.description: Tangira kwishimira banki mu ntoki zawe. Gucunga konti, kohereza amafaranga, kwishyura amafaranga, n'ibindi.

billPayments.subtitle: Kwishyura amafaranga yawe vuba kandi umutekano

savings.title: Ama Konti yo Kubitsa
savings.subtitle: Kura amafaranga yawe ukoresheje ibipimo by'inyungu

about.title: Ibyerekeye Prime Trust Finance
about.subtitle: Kubaka ejo hazaza heza binyuze mu mfatanyabikorwa y'amafaranga
about.story1: Prime Trust Finance yashinzwe mu 2018 ifite intego yo guhuza banki gakondo n'ibyo abantu n'ibigo bikenera mu by'amafaranga.
about.story2: Urugendo rwacu rwayobowe no gusobanukirwa neza n'isoko ry'igihugu no kugira uruhare mu buryo bw'imari.
about.story3: Uyu munsi, Prime Trust Finance itanga ibicuruzwa byinshi birimo amakonti yo kubitsa, inguzanyo, amakarita, kohereza amafaranga, no kwishyura amafaranga.
about.missionText: Guha abakiliya bacu ubushobozi bwo kubona ibisubizo by'amafaranga bikenewe, bishya, kandi bishinzwe bihindura ubuzima.
about.visionText: Kuba mugenzi w'ikizere kandi ufite ubushishozi, ufasha iterambere no gutunga imari muri Afurika.

trust.title: Ikizere n'Ubunyangamugayo
trust.desc: Dubaka isano irambye binyuze mu kuri, umusemburo, n'imyitwarire myiza.

innovation.title: Ubushishozi
innovation.desc: Duhora duhanga ibicuruzwa byacu kugirango duhuze n'ibyo abakiliya bacu bakeneye.

customerFocus.title: Gushimangira Abakiliya
customerFocus.desc: Abakiliya bacu ni bo mu mutima wa buri cyemezo. Intsinzi yabo ni intsinzi yacu.

community.title: Umuryango
community.desc: Twiyemeje gushyigikira no gufasha imiryango tukorera.

support.title: Turi Hano Kugufasha
support.subtitle: Ubufasha buraboneka buri gihe ku bakiliya bacu.

chat.title: Kuganira
chat.desc: Ganira n'itsinda ryacu mu gihe nyacyo

faq.title: Ibibazo Bikunze
faq.q1: Nigute nahindura ijambo ry'ibanga rya banki?
faq.q2: Ni iyihe nyandiko isabwa kugirango nfungure konti?
faq.q3: Kohereza amafaranga bifata igihe kingana iki?
faq.q4: Ni iyihe mibare y'inyungu ku makonti yo kubitsa?

emergency.title: Ubufasha bw'Ikaduha
emergency.desc: Kuri karita zatakaye cyangwa zibeje, hamagara umurongo w'ikaduha 24/7:

questions.q1Answer:
• Ndimo kugura inzu
  • Ndimo kugura ikibanza
  • Ndimo kugura imodoka
questions.q2Answer: Ushobora guhamagara 4455 kuva kuwa Mbere kugeza kuwa Gatanu, 9h - 17h, no kuwa Gatandatu 9h - 13h. Cyangwa ohereza imeli kuri info@primetrust.com.
questions.q3Answer: Inguzanyo zihinduka ukurikije ubwoko n'ubushobozi bwawe. Inguzanyo ku giti cyanji zitangira kuri 500,000 RWF kugeza kuri 50,000,000 RWF.
questions.q4: Ni iyihe nyandiko isabwa kugirango nfungure konti?
questions.q4Answer: Uzakeneye irangamuntu (Indangamuntu cyangwa Passeportu), ikimenyetso cy'ubuturo, amafoto, n'umubare w'ikigo cy'inkunga.

professional.title: Ndi Umuhanga
professional.subtitle: Nshoboye gutsinda hamwe na banki y'ibanze

benefits.title: Banki ya Premium
benefits.desc: Ama konti yihariye kubahanga hamwe n'imipaka myinshi.

benefits.title: Banki ya Digital
benefits.desc: Bona konti zawe uva aho uri.

currencyCalculator.title: Koresha Ifaranga ry'Isi Yoroshye
currencyCalculator.subtitle: Ibipimo bya kera by'ifaranga mu gihe nyacyo

mortgages.title: Inguzanyo z'Inzu
mortgages.subtitle: Shakisha inguzanyo y'inzu ikwiye inzozi zawe
mortgages.heroDesc: Shakisha amahitamo y'inguzanyo y'inzu afite amipaka y'agaciro n'inama z'abahanga muri buri ntambwe.
mortgages.homePurchaseDesc: Gura inzu yawe ya mbere cyangwa indi muri zawe ukoresheje inguzanyo z'inyubako ziflexible.
mortgages.refinanceDesc: Gabanya ibyo wishyura cyangwa ukoreshe agaciro k'inzu yawe ukoresheje inguzanyo nshya.
mortgages.renewalDesc: Vugurura inguzanyo yawe y'inzu hamwe n'amipaka n'ibigerekezo byiza.
mortgages.helocDesc: Koresha agaciro k'inzu yawe hamwe n'uruhigo rw'inguzanyo iflexible.
mortgages.preApprovalDesc: Menya ingengo y'imari yawe mbere yo kugura. Emerererwa mu minota mike.

investments.title: Ishoramari
investments.subtitle: Kuraza umutungo wawe hamwe n'ibisubizo by'ishoramari by'ubwenge
investments.heroDesc: Kuva kuri konti y'ububiko itishyurwa imisoro kugera ku gutegura izabukuru, dufite ibikoresho n'ubuhanga bwo kugufasha kugera ku ntego zawe z'imari.
investments.tfsaDesc: Kuraza ububiko bwawe utishyuye imisoro hamwe n'amahitamo y'umusanzu aflexible.
investments.rrspDesc: Bika izabukuru hamwe n'umusanzu ugabanya imisoro n'ikura ry'imisoro ryatinze.
investments.fhsaDesc: Bika kugura inzu yawe ya mbere hamwe n'umusanzu ugabanya imisoro n'ikura ry'imisoro.
investments.respDesc: Bika amashuri y'umwana hamwe n'inkunga za leta n'ikura ry'imisoro ryatinze.
investments.gicsDesc: Bona inyungu zizewe hamwe n'ibihe biflexible kuva mu mezi 6 kugeza ku myaka 5.
investments.mutualFundsDesc: Tandukanya umutungo wawe hamwe n'amafaranga ayoborwa n'abahanga.

insurance.title: Ubwishingizi
insurance.subtitle: Rinda iby'ingenzi cyane
insurance.heroDesc: Kuva ku kurinda inguzanyo kugera ku bwishingizi bwo ngendo, dutanga ubwishingizi bwuzuye kuri buri ntambwe y'ubuzima.
insurance.creditProtectionDesc: Rinda ubwishyu bwawe bw'inguzanyo na karti ya banki mu gihe habaye ibitunguranye.
insurance.mortgageProtectionDesc: Ereka ko inguzanyo yawe y'inzu itwikiriwe kugirango umuryango wawe ukomeze kuba mu nzu ye.
insurance.loanProtectionDesc: Rinda ubwishyu bwawe bw'inguzanyo hamwe n'amahitamo aflexible.
insurance.cardProtection: Kurinda Ubwishyu bwa Karti ya Banki
insurance.cardProtectionDesc: Rinda ubwishyu bwawe bw'ibanze mu bihe bigoye.
insurance.singleTripDesc: Ubwishingizi bw'urugendo rumwe hamwe no kurinda kuvaho kw'itike.
insurance.annualTripDesc: Ingendo zitagira imipaka mu mwaka wose hamwe n'ubwishingizi bwuzuye.

advice.title: Inama
advice.subtitle: Ubujyanama bw'imari bw'inzobere kuri buri ntambwe y'ubuzima
advice.heroDesc: Inzobere zacu zitanga ubujyanama bukwiriye buri wese kugufasha gufata ibyemezo by'imari by'ubwenge.
advice.budgetingDesc: Wige ukuntu ushobora gushyiraho ingengo y'imari ikora kuri wowe kandi ukayikurikiza.
advice.savingDesc: Menya uburyo bwiza bwo kubika byinshi kugera ku ntego zawe z'imari byihuse.
advice.investingDesc: Tangira urugendo rwawe rw'ishoramari wizewe hamwe n'ubuyobozi bw'abatangira.
advice.debtManagementDesc: Inama zifatika zo gucunga no kugabanya imyenda yawe neza.
advice.retirementDesc: Tegura izabukuru nziza hamwe n'ubujyanama bw'inzobere zacu.

smallBusiness.title: Ubucuruzi Buto
smallBusiness.subtitle: Ibikoresho by'amabanki byateguwe kuri ba rwiyemezamirimo
smallBusiness.heroDesc: Kuva kuri konti z'ubucuruzi kugera ku nguzanyo, dutanga ibikoresho ukeneye kugirango utsinde.
smallBusiness.accountsDesc: Konti zihariye zifite ibiranga byateguriwe ba nyir'ubucuruzi bato.
smallBusiness.financingDesc: Inguzanyo n'uruhigo rw'inguzanyo biflexible kugirango byubake ubucuruzi bwawe.
smallBusiness.merchantDesc: Emera ubwishyu ucunga ibikorwa by'ubucuruzi byoroheje.

commercial.title: Banki Y'ubucuruzi
commercial.subtitle: Ibikoresho by'imari byuzuye by'ubucuruzi bwawe
commercial.heroDesc: Serivisi za banki z'ubucuruzi zikwiriye kugufasha ubucuruzi bwawe gutsinda.
commercial.corporateAccountsDesc: Ibikoresho by'amabanki by'ibanze ku bigo byashizweho.
commercial.tradeFinancingDesc: Fasha ubucuruzi mpuzamahanga hamwe n'ibisubizo by'iterankunga.
commercial.assetFinancingDesc: Fata inkunga y'ibikoresho, imodoka, n'ibindi bicuruzwa.
commercial.corporateLoansDesc: Iterankunga ryingenzi ryo kwagura no gushora imari mu bucuruzi.

wealth.title: Gucunga Umutungo
wealth.subtitle: Bika kandi ukaze umutungo wawe ufite ubuyobozi bw'inhanga
wealth.heroDesc: Inzobere zacu mu gucunga umutungo zitanga ingamba zikwiriye buri wese kugufasha kugera ku ntego zawe z'imari.
wealth.portfolioDesc: Umutungo w'ishoramari uyoborwa n'abahanga ukwiriye intego zawe.
wealth.estateDesc: Ereka umurage wawe hamwe n'ibisubizo byuzuye byo gutegura umurage.
wealth.taxDesc: Gabanya umutwaro wawe w'imisoro hamwe no gushyira ingamba n' amahitamo y'ishoramari.
wealth.philanthropyDesc: Ibikoresho byo gutanga by'ingamba kugirango byongere ingaruka nziza.

institutional.title: Banki Y'ibigo
institutional.subtitle: Ubufatanye bw'imari bw'ingamba ku bigo
institutional.heroDesc: Serivisi za banki n'imari zuzuye za guverinoma, NGO, n'ibigo bikomeye.
institutional.treasuryDesc: Koresha amafaranga neza kandi ucunge ububasha bwawe hamwe n'ibisubizo by'ubutunzi.
institutional.custodialDesc: Kubitsa no gucunga umutungo wawe w'imari umutekano.
institutional.financingDesc: Ibikoresho by'iterankunga by'urugero ku mushinga n'ibikorwa by'ibigo.
institutional.advisoryDesc: Ubujyanama bw'imari bw'inhanga ku gufata ibyemezo by'ibigo.

promotions.title: Amahirwe n'Ibitekerezo
promotions.subtitle: Amaturo adasanzwe n'ibitekerezo ku bakiriya bacu
promotions.heroDesc: Koresha amahirwe y'igihe gito kuri konti, karti za banki, inguzanyo z'inzu, n'ibindi.
promotions.chequingOfferDesc: Bona kugeza kuri $750 y'agaciro ukoresheje Konti ya Chequing. Ibibazo bikurikizwa.
promotions.creditCardOfferDesc: Kugeza kuri $1,350 y'agaciro harimo kugeza kuri 40,000 points. Ibibazo bikurikizwa.
promotions.mortgageOfferDesc: Bona kugeza kuri $5,100 cashback hamwe n'inguzanyo nshya y'inzu. Ibibazo bikurikizwa.
promotions.newcomerOfferDesc: Bona kugeza kuri $1,790 y'agaciro iyo ubankiye natwe nk'umushya. Ibibazo bikurikizwa.
promotions.terms: Ibibazo n'ibigenderwaho birakurikizwa. Amaturo ashobora gukurwaho icyo gihe cytose.

rewards.title: Gahunda Y'ingoramari
rewards.subtitle: Bona ingoramari kuri buri kiguzi
rewards.heroDesc: Injira muri gahunda yacu y'ingoramari kandi ubone points kuri buri kiguzi. Cungura kuri ngendo, ibicuruzwa, cashback, n'ibindi.
rewards.earnDesc: Bona point 1 kuri buri $1 ukoresheje. Bona inshuro 2 points kuri ngendo no kurya.
rewards.redeemDesc: Cungura points zawe kuri ngendo, karti z'impano, ibicuruzwa, cyangwa cashback.
rewards.bonusDesc: Bona points z'inyongera ukoresheje amaturo adasanzwe n'ibitekerezo by'abafatanyabikorwa.

rates.title: Ibipimo By'ubu
rates.subtitle: Menya ibipimo bya vuba
rates.disclaimer: Ibipimo birahinduka bitatangajwe. Baza kugirango umenye ibipimo by'ubu.

foreignExchange.title: Kwanghana Amafaranga Mpuzamahanga
foreignExchange.subtitle: Ibipimo by'impinduka y'amaferanga by'igihe nyacyo
foreignExchange.heroDesc: Ibipimo by'impinduka y'amaferanga bikwiranye n'ibyo ukeneye byose byo kohereza amafaranga mpuzamahanga.
foreignExchange.note: Ibipimo birerekana gusa kandi birahinduka. Baza ishami ryawe kugirango ubone ibipimo byemewe.

privacy.title: Politiki Y'ibanga
privacy.subtitle: Uko turinda amakuru yawe y'ibanga
privacy.heroDesc: Turacyemeje kurinda ibanga n'umutekano w'amakuru yawe y'ibanga.
privacy.section1: Tukusanya amakuru y'ibanga utanga, harimo izina, aderesi, imeri, numero ya terefone, amakuru y'imari, n'inyandiko z'irangamuntu.
privacy.section2: Dukoresha amakuru yawe kugira ngo dutange serivisi za banki, duhaze ibikorwa, twemeze indego yawe, twubahirize ibisabwa n'amategeko, no guteza imbere serivisi zacu.
privacy.section3: Ntitugurisha amakuru yawe y'ibanga. Dushobora kugabana amakuru yawe n'abatanga serivisi ba gatatu b'ibizewe.
privacy.section4: Dukoresha ingamba z'umutekano z'urwego rw'inganda kugirango turinde amakuru yawe, harimo encrypter, firewalls, n'ahantu h' amakuru hizewe.

terms.title: Amategeko Y'ibikorwa
terms.subtitle: Amategeko n'ibigenderwaho byo gukoresha serivisi zacu
terms.heroDesc: Nyamuneka usome amategeko neza mbere yo gukoresha serivisi zacu.
terms.section1: Mu gufungura konti muri Prime Trust Finance, wemera gutanga amakuru yukuri kandi yuzuye.
terms.section2: Serivisi zacu za banki za elegitoronike zitangirwa ku buryo bwawe. Dushishoza gukomeza kugera nta guhagarara.
terms.section3: Amafaranga ya serivisi za banki asobanurwa mu gahunda yacu y'amafaranga, ishobora kuvugururwa igihe cytose.
terms.section4: Inshingano zacu kuri buri kirego kiva muri serivisi zacu zigarukira nk'uko bisobanuwe muri aya mategeko.

profile.title: Umwirondoro Wange
profile.subtitle: Cunga amakuru yawe y'ibanga n'ibyo ukunda
